» Chart example with mixed values (the chart area is split between the posi
tive and negative side, so bars get less space when the absolute values dif
fer a lot)

 2              5         7
                          ██
                          ██
                ██        ██
                ██        ██
 ██             ██        ██
      ██   ██
      ██
      -3   -2
Q1   Q2   Q3   Q4   Yearly Total

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
